concept: The evolution of what your kids call you over the years: DADA (baby) → DADDY (toddler) → DAD (kid) → BRUH (teenager). Bold stacked typography with a tiny icon row showing the journey — pacifier, baseball, coffee cup, sunglasses.
title: Dada Daddy Dad Bruh Shirt, Funny Dad Evolution Tee, Father's Day Gift, New Dad Teen Dad Gift, Bruh Dad Joke Shirt, Gift From Wife Kids
description:
One shirt. Four life stages. Zero respect by the end.

It starts with "DADA" at 2am — the first word, the one that wrecks you. Then comes "DADDY" with the sticky-hand hug. Then "DAD," said louder and louder from across the yard. And eventually? "BRUH." Usually while you're trying to help. Welcome to the evolution.

Perfect for:
• New dads still riding the DADA high
• Seasoned dads deep in the BRUH era
• Father's Day gifts from the wife who's had to hear all four stages
• Gifts from kids who know exactly which word they're currently stuck on
• Birthday gifts that actually land, for once

DETAILS
• Premium soft-feel unisex tee, true-to-size
• Vibrant print that won't crack, peel, or fade wash after wash
• Available in bold typographic light colorway AND rainbow-stacked dark colorway
• Tiny evolution icon row (pacifier → baseball → coffee → sunglasses) as a subtle design detail
• Made-to-order and printed with care

Fit tip: runs true to size. Size up for the classic dad-bod relaxed look.

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
